title: RegistryEntry
description: Atomic unit of the Universal Registry Fabric (URF-S). Represents a single immutable registry record.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this registry entry.

entry_type.description: Type/category of the registry entry (e.g., identity, governance_action, doctrine_rule, predictive_output).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the entry was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the entry was last updated.

payload.description: The full content of the registry entry. Structure varies by entry_type.

anchor.description: Anchor binding this entry to an immutable reference point.

chain.description: Chain membership information for this entry.

lineage.description: Lineage information showing how this entry relates to earlier or later versions.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature ensuring authenticity and integrity.
